title: False Signal unoptimizable: circular logic warning

features.name: intra-signal bit dependency with packed array indexing
features.description: Code should include an assignment where one bit of a packed array is used to compute another bit of the same packed array signal, triggering a false circular logic warning in Verilator
features.snippet:
logic [7:0] bus;
always_ff @(posedge clk) bus[1] <= bus[0] & 1'b1;
